textByHash.feee814cb4ab56d0c0651f23dfe6074bc2ab81b9: Why, that part of the mines hasn't been used in a long time. I don't rightly know what you would find behind there.
textByHash.c5d25b6ebb56a4b26bf4e608d9f2a1a5d704f926: I don't have the authority to do that kind of thing.
textByHash.e54998dc6194a946e578a4ff901747fc8ae49d35: I don't know. Perhaps you have an influential friend?
textByHash.7144c3424738e08fef70504a5e1611e7e6c68890: I don't know that either. Don't you have any influential friends in the city?
textByHash.dd9a478ae3cf32334acff74816049ee7aeab8491: I'm an employee of Keldagrim Carts. I make sure the carts in this area run on time and that people pay their fares.
textByHash.361b15b96ef3ad85076d40d91a20389fa895bf60: I don't think I'm allowed to take you into the city of Keldagrim, human. Perhaps when you find another way into the city and talk to someone of importance there you will be allowed to.
textByHash.fac3986764ce1d3820c87327b65e07f624aab39b: This track leads right up to Keldagrim. Only stop.
textByHash.69fbf356c29efc71eae8c72af254ffe14dbd6498: One ticket to Keldagrim, that's 150 coins then.
textByHash.c27677bdee3dfd89a24d9621a2e026a8a70035d5: I'm sorry, sir, but I don't believe you can hold the ticket.
textByHash.aa221535a18621967c292253fb65e59cb1b77fde: This is only 75 coins, I can't let you have a ticket for that.
textByHash.d1cb5d5fa20a731a1f32f1aa77d0b4badb4bfcc9: Just remember, wherever you go, you go there faster through Keldagrim Carts.
textByHash.66160047e23f2d8ec355c4d3ede106fc096553bf: I can't take you anywhere at the moment.
textByHash.811931a1b8e2a0da00c5d0b6d80670711c8565eb: I can't sell any more tickets right now, I'm afraid.
textByHash.1afc5b53986cbe625066ff8638d412ef934e4f02: Whooooo? Meeeee? Oh, I make sure the cart traffic proceedsh in an orderly fishion. Fashion. Yes.
textByHash.b402a60e510b7400e964fc4d947defbe5268687b: North, north, north north to Keldagrim!
textByHash.9bb354fc0387137f0b1d91fe0136d1ae6866e7ed: One ticket to ehm... Keldagrim. That's 2... 3.... 100 glittering gold coins!
textByHash.09f5292a111d55c0350c53a0bb0d29bf0f363efa: I'm sorry, madam, but I don't believe you can hold the ticket.
textByHash.316e62cdcd4c014161a7602224a46210a9076810: Thanksh a lot human! Remember to come back for more shtout whenever you want!
textByHash.44f44287ee602a7a3b3576fce49297cb2c625671: Waith a shecond... that'sh only 50 coinsh!
textByHash.09ae700b88829c72df6d9a4c31369a514b30d4da: Errr... yesh, I shuppose you're right.
textByHash.4f9ffd99f14dbe8c5930919d4d2d71d7d40180af: Just remember, wherever you go... ehm... oh, forget it.
textByHash.e472daa5166f4fac4d9a371451c2e405d79e5005: Yes sir? Can I help you at all?
textByHash.a2a00f5cb8db85b1be7da1fe958622fb7516f4f6: Yes m'am? Can I help you at all?
textByHash.49c40fe54700c2121833ac0994f4878747e30b05: You're in the main waiting area of Keldagrim Carts- station.
textByHash.4672372e67666547a779b74096c71f431098bda2: Keldagrim is the hub of all the traffic of the dwarven realm. Almost every dwarven outpost has railtracks leading to Keldagrim, connecting them all for easy travel and transportation of goods.
textByHash.a9e0bfbf6fe0546e41bcd0fd6d0853c061659630: Oh, no no, we dwarves don't use magic. No, all of this is powered by steam engines, developed during the past few centuries after the Consortium came to power.
textByHash.ddf1fb47fb4ddc99d25baf53911fcadf309677e3: Let's see, we could let you travel to Ice Mountain, or to the Grand Exchange.
textByHash.068432f831fce620e5c6791e63aeb32ba749c0b9: I could also let you go to White Wolf Mountain, since you've befriended our brothers there.
textByHash.add1f9ebd53d37d099703efc136ab1761bbeb075: And where would you like to go?
textByHash.0cc9b1cbd6e2718acc48b660182aad428e0bc71e: Oh, that service is free. Just hop on a cart on Track 3, and away you go.
textByHash.2ef3ad9e1ce89676193026e55871195ca00731d4: Thanks, carts to Ice Mountain depart from track 1.
textByHash.335e77a7a1d14c1edd62845ebb316ed1d03835f0: You're alright, I suppose... I can let you go for 75 coins. And remember, carts to Ice Mountain depart from track 1.
textByHash.e110ec1c5961580dac1e99f72deaacec856a0806: Thanks. Go to track 4 for carts heading to White Wolf Mountain.
textByHash.64aa5aa315be19d494bd34c19d703f9b6744d663: You're a decent human, I suppose... I can let you go for 50 coins. Go to track 4 for the carts heading to White Wolf Mountain.
textByHash.c4f1c1f901ed5448eca74de5ac3d1536b095d47a: That service is free. Just hop on a cart on Track 3, and away you go.
textByHash.cd979bd2b89dca3e2dfaf39c8326ea0b69b8bba0: Anything I can help you with?
textByHash.29b1eb56d31d1e1781520df13e1661e584eab058: This is the Keldagrim Carts-station, human.
textByHash.824869c0e55dc77d6e292c7c2d6cb7467be54a1e: There's important traffic coming through here and I don't want any stray humans distracting me.
textByHash.290b69abcf4a3d273ebdab37c8cb2c518afe6a9c: Tickets, tickets, get your tickets here!
textByHash.96cb32ccf903541ef8296f8bcfe66b4c6035b53e: Can't you see I'm 'aving a lil' break?
textByHash.cac2f9e87b00536141cbcefd81ea617e891f9280: Then why did ya waste my time?
textByHash.a1481948a66870b061aff9d18d6491f7dde3768c: Ahoy up there! Would you like to ride our minecart to Keldagrim? It's free.
textByHash.99d4a45ed676a89292f22455df5b206324df4503: Ahoy up there! You'd better pick up your follower before you come down here and ride the minecart.
textByHash.36f29d56f656d9dcdece9fb385e249bb0bb16cd1: Watch out, sir! Don't want anything to run over your follower!
textByHash.cb70dbfd82b980a7fd58cacbfd212602454fc9ba: Watch out, madam! Don't want anything to run over your follower!
textByHash.8c3f3a6c1957018a14f64a6affcb062f70e617fb: Ice Mountain carts departing from Track 1!
textByHash.cd58da192ff4c1823b3383088ca0392fa72da68d: Grand Exchange carts departing from Track 3!
textByHash.0630421c0dfe4b05d365705a4f9236e73f3e5c5b: White Wolf Mountain carts departing from Track 4!
